prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Widow in Cabin 9
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Court-Ordered Lifetime
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: secret half sibling
Props: boat key, snow globe, casserole dish

Cast:
- Rachel Pruitt | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.45 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=once left town without explaining why; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Brooke Marlowe | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=private school administrator | threat_aura=0.89 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=has a second phone labeled as a work precaution; rehearsed his alibi before anyone asked
- Wyatt Winterson | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.55 | space=storage unit described as retreat supplies | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence; knows about a half sibling no one asked for

- Rachel Pike | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Elias Pruitt | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Brooke Marlowe is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Rachel Pruitt says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Brooke?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Rachel. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Rachel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The boat key is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Wyatt."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
